name: FIBROGEN INC.  DL-,01
summary: FibroGen, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering, developing, and commercializing therapeutics to treat unmet medical needs. The company's lead product candidate is roxadustat, an oral hypoxia-inducible factor prolyl hydroxylase inhibitor for the treatment of anemia. FibroGen is headquartered in San Francisco, California.
